product_overview: A modern, animated personal portfolio built with Next.js and TypeScript to showcase projects, skills, and contact information with rich, performant UI animations and responsive design. The site emphasizes interactive hero animations, animated skill and counter displays, and an accessible contact flow.
core_goals: Showcase professional projects and technical skills in a visually engaging manner
Provide clear navigation and fast, performant animations across devices
Enable visitors to contact the portfolio owner easily
Highlight technical competencies and project details to support hiring or freelance opportunities
Keep interactions lightweight and accessible (no heavy animation libraries)

features.name: Hero Section with Animations
features.description: Dynamic hero section with typing animation showing multiple roles, particles background, floating gradient blobs, and CTA buttons
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View animated gradient text for name -> See typing animation cycling through roles -> Observe interactive particle background -> Click View My Work button -> Navigate to /skills
Navigate to / -> See typing animation -> Click Get In Touch button -> Navigate to /contact
Navigate to / -> Click social media icon (GitHub) -> Open new tab to github.com (placeholder URL) -> See external site open (placeholder)
Navigate to / on mobile -> Observe custom cursor not present (mobile-hidden) -> See hero still readable and CTA buttons usable

features.name: Statistics Counter Animation
features.description: Animated counters showing years of experience, projects completed, technologies mastered, and client satisfaction
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to statistics section -> Watch counters animate from 0 to target values when visible -> View icon animations for each statistic
Navigate to / -> Scroll past statistics quickly -> Counters do not animate because they never become visible for the intersection observer -> Manually scroll back to section -> Counters animate

features.name: Featured Projects Preview
features.description: Preview of three main projects (MernEats, Bistro Boss, LearnGo) with technology badges and hover effects
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View project cards with gradient backgrounds -> Hover over project card -> See lift effect -> Hover over technology badge -> See scale animation -> Click View All Projects button -> Observe no navigation because button has no destination (known limitation)
Navigate to / -> View MernEats project card -> See technology badges (React, Node.js, MongoDB) -> Hover over card to see lift and border highlight

features.name: About Page Personal Story
features.description: Detailed personal story, profile image placeholder with gradient, and animated content sections
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> View animated profile image with gradient background -> Read personal story about background and journey -> See floating animation on profile card
Navigate to /about -> Hover over profile card -> See glow effect -> Note profile image is a gradient placeholder (no real photo) because actual image is not provided (known limitation)

features.name: Project Showcase
features.description: Detailed showcase of three major projects with descriptions, features, and technology stacks
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Scroll to project showcase -> View MernEats project details with features and tech stack -> Hover over project card -> See border color change -> See Live badge on active projects

Navigate to /about -> Scroll to Bistro Boss project -> Hover over technology badges -> See scale animation -> Click project card expecting external demo -> If external link not configured, see placeholder or no navigation

features.name: Education and Languages
features.description: Display education details and language proficiencies with progress indicators
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Scroll to education section -> View education details (B.Sc. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering) -> See institution and expected graduation year
Navigate to /about -> Scroll to languages section -> View language proficiencies (English, Bengali, Hindi) -> See proficiency level indicators

features.name: Animated Skill Bars
features.description: Skill bars that animate and fill when scrolled into view, organized by categories (Frontend, Backend, Tools, Specializations)
user_flows: Navigate to /skills -> Scroll to skills section -> Watch skill bars animate from 0% to skill level when visible -> See shimmer effect on skill bars during animation -> View technology icons next to each skill
Navigate to /skills on mobile -> Tap skill card -> Hover-style shadow effects are not present on touch devices -> Skill percentage still visible and animation runs when in view

features.name: Technology Grid
features.description: Interactive grid showcasing all technologies with icons and hover effects
user_flows: Navigate to /skills -> View grid of 18 technologies with custom icons -> Hover over technology card -> See scale and shadow effects -> See gradient sweep animation on hover -> Read technology name below icon
Navigate to /skills -> Load page with reduced motion enabled -> Observe staggered fade-in suppressed or simplified for accessibility

features.name: Core Competencies
features.description: Display of key competencies with icons and descriptions
user_flows: Navigate to /skills -> Scroll to core competencies -> View competency cards (Full Stack Development, Payment Integration, State Management) -> Hover over card -> See lift effect -> Read competency description
Navigate to /skills -> Use keyboard navigation to focus competency card -> Observe focus state and read description via screen reader

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Functional contact form with validation, animations, and success feedback
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill in name field -> Fill in email field with valid email -> Fill in subject field -> Fill in message textarea -> Click Send Message button -> See loading spinner during submission -> View success message after submission -> See form reset after successful submission
Navigate to /contact -> Fill in name field -> Leave email field empty or enter invalid email -> Click Send Message button -> See client-side validation error message and focus on email field
Navigate to /contact -> Fill valid form and submit -> See success message but submission is simulated (setTimeout) and not actually sent to backend (known limitation)

features.name: Contact Information Display
features.description: Display of contact details with icons and hover effects
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> View email address with clickable mailto link -> Click email link -> Email client opens with recipient prefilled
Navigate to /contact -> View phone number -> Click phone number link -> Device prompts call initiation (tel link) -> On desktop, tel link may open calling app if configured

features.name: Social Links
features.description: Social media links with icons and hover animations
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> View GitHub, LinkedIn, Twitter, and Email icons -> Hover over social icons -> See scale and color change -> Click GitHub icon -> Open new tab to github.com (placeholder URL) and observe placeholder destination (known limitation)
Navigate to / -> Click LinkedIn icon in hero -> Open new tab to linkedin.com (placeholder) -> If user expects personal profile, they must update links in project

features.name: Navigation Bar
features.description: Responsive navigation with logo, menu items, and mobile menu
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View Sakib logo with gradient animation -> Click About link in navbar -> Navigate to /about -> See active page indicator on About link
Navigate to / on small screen -> Click mobile menu button -> View slide-down mobile menu -> Click Skills link in mobile menu -> Navigate to /skills
Navigate to / -> Hover over a nav link -> See underline animation -> Use keyboard to tab to link -> See visible focus state

features.name: Footer
features.description: Footer with brand info, quick links, contact details, and social media
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll to footer -> View brand description and quick links -> Click About quick link -> Navigate to /about
Navigate to / -> Scroll to footer -> Click social media icon -> Open external platform in new tab (placeholder URLs may apply) -> See copyright information

features.name: Scroll to Top Button
features.description: Floating button that appears on scroll and returns user to top of page
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll down more than 300px -> See button fade in from bottom right -> Hover over button -> See scale effect -> Click button -> Smoothly scroll to top -> See button fade out when near top
Navigate to / -> Scroll to 200px (less than threshold) -> Button remains hidden -> Continue scrolling beyond threshold -> Button appears

features.name: Loading Screen
features.description: Initial loading screen with progress bar and animated logo
user_flows: Open site root / for first visit -> View loading screen on initial page load -> Watch progress bar animate from 0% to 100% -> See floating logo animation -> Watch loading screen fade out when complete
Reload page during development -> Loading screen may not always appear (cached resources) -> Page content loads directly without loader

features.name: Custom Cursor Effect
features.description: Custom animated cursor with ring and dot (desktop only)
user_flows: Navigate to / on desktop -> Move mouse to see custom cursor ring and dot -> Hover over clickable element -> See ring scale up -> Observe smooth cursor trail effect
Navigate to / on mobile -> Move touch interactions -> Custom cursor is hidden -> All clickable elements remain functional

features.name: Page Transitions
features.description: Smooth page transition animations when navigating between routes
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click About link -> See gradient overlay fade in -> Watch new page content fade in on /about -> Transition completes smoothly
Navigate between pages with prefers-reduced-motion enabled -> Observe simplified or disabled page transitions for accessibility

routes.description: Home page with hero section, typing animation, particles background, statistics counters, and featured projects preview
About page with personal story, project showcase, education details, and languages
Skills page with animated skill bars, technology grid with icons, and core competencies
Contact page with contact form, contact information, social links, and availability status

known_limitations.issue: Contact form submission is simulated with setTimeout, not connected to backend API
known_limitations.impact: Form submissions are not actually sent or stored, only UI feedback is shown

known_limitations.issue: Social media links use placeholder URLs (github.com, linkedin.com)
known_limitations.impact: Social links do not navigate to actual profile pages

known_limitations.issue: View All Projects button has no destination
known_limitations.impact: Button does not navigate to a projects page (page does not exist)

known_limitations.issue: No actual profile image, using gradient placeholder
known_limitations.impact: Profile section shows initials instead of real photo
